title: InspectParallelAxesReport
description:
Output ``data`` block for ``inspect-parallel-axes`` (WS5 #7).

Wraps inside the standard SuccessEnvelope's ``data`` field (see envelope.json). Carries the two signals the build-executor / axes-init companion branches on: the parsed ``.hpc/axes.yaml`` (so it knows whether axes-init already ran and what it recorded) and the raw ``.hpc/tasks.py`` body (so the agent can identify each parallel dimension from the grid / ``resolve`` shape).

axes_yaml_path.title: Axes Yaml Path
axes_yaml_path.description: Absolute path to ``<experiment_dir>/.hpc/axes.yaml`` (whether or not it exists).

axes_yaml_present.title: Axes Yaml Present
axes_yaml_present.description: Whether ``axes.yaml`` exists on disk. When true, axes-init would refuse-without-force; the companion passes ``--force`` only when intentionally re-initializing.

axes_yaml_error.title: Axes Yaml Error
axes_yaml_error.description: Non-null when ``axes.yaml`` exists but failed to parse / validate (corruption surfaced as a string rather than raised, so the ``tasks.py`` half is still returned).

axes.title: Axes
axes.description: The ordered ``axes`` list from ``axes.yaml`` (each ``{name, size}``), or ``[]`` when absent / unrecorded.

homogeneous_axes.title: Homogeneous Axes
homogeneous_axes.description: The ``homogeneous_axes`` hint from ``axes.yaml``, or ``[]`` when absent.

executors.title: Executors
executors.description: The v2 ``executors`` block (classified-DataAxis records per ``@register_run`` function), or ``{}`` when absent.

tasks_py_path.title: Tasks Py Path
tasks_py_path.description: Absolute path to ``<experiment_dir>/.hpc/tasks.py`` (whether or not it exists).

tasks_py_body.title: Tasks Py Body
tasks_py_body.description: The raw ``tasks.py`` text (tail-capped to ~8000 chars), for the agent to identify each parallel dimension from the FLAGS / grid / ``resolve`` shape. Empty string when ``tasks.py`` is absent. Returned as text — never imported / executed (pure query).
